Footer.desc: The first digital platform for the Haitian automotive sector.
Footer.support_fr_ht_en: Customer assistance available in French, Haitian Creole, and English.
Footer.verified_network: A verified network of garages and parts providers for a more reliable journey.
Footer.smart_guidance: Clear guidance between diagnosis, compatible parts, and appointment booking.

HomePage.subtitle: Find a certified garage, order your car parts, manage your maintenance and consult
HomePage.subtitle_end: — your AI automotive assistant — all in one.
HomePage.panel_vehicle_detail: Maintenance history, parts compatibility, and reminders centralized in one place.
HomePage.panel_service_detail: Prepare the intervention, compare available options, and book with a certified garage.
HomePage.panel_metric_one_label: to confirm an intervention or order
HomePage.panel_metric_two_label: to follow garages, parts, and assistance

Features.subtitle: AUTONORME brings garages, auto parts, and artificial intelligence together to transform your automotive experience in Haiti.
Features.garage_description: Access 200+ certified garages across Haiti. Geolocation, specialties, customer reviews, and online booking.
Features.parts_description: More than 5,000 parts available. Automatic compatibility check with your vehicle and real-time stock.
Features.autobot_description: Your intelligent automotive assistant in French, Haitian Creole, and English. Advice, diagnostics, and personalized recommendations.

Stats.title: AUTONORME is growing fast
Stats.subtitle: Growth driven by the trust of Haitian drivers and professionals.

AutoBotPreview.title: AutoBot helps you decide faster and with more confidence.
AutoBotPreview.body: Rather than a simple chat demo, AutoBot acts as a journey advisor. It helps qualify a problem, suggests suitable parts, and prepares the next step with a trusted garage.
AutoBotPreview.benefit_1_desc: Describe the symptom or service you need to get clear direction before spending.
AutoBotPreview.benefit_2_desc: Receive recommendations aligned with your vehicle, your budget, and local availability.
AutoBotPreview.benefit_3_desc: Continue naturally toward a garage, a parts order, or an appointment booking.
AutoBotPreview.scenario_title: Brake noise on a 2020 Toyota Corolla
AutoBotPreview.scenario_text: AutoBot identifies what to check, explains likely options, and prepares the useful references before the garage visit.
AutoBotPreview.next_step_text: Once the right option is selected, AutoBot can direct the customer to the right garage and prepare the appointment with the context already summarized.

HomeCTA.title: A platform designed to reassure drivers, from first diagnosis to final appointment.
HomeCTA.subtitle: Create your space, find certified garages, verify your parts, and keep better control over your vehicle maintenance.
HomeCTA.proof_1: A clear journey between need, part, and intervention
HomeCTA.proof_2: Multilingual access built for the Haitian market
HomeCTA.proof_3: A serious foundation to modernize automotive service

Garages.title: Partner Garages
Garages.subtitle: Find a trusted garage near you, certified to AUTONORME quality standards.
Garages.highlight_1: Search by city, neighborhood, or specialty
Garages.results_hint: Refine by area or by service needed
Garages.load_error: Unable to load garages right now. Check your connection and try again.
Garages.empty_search: Try another neighborhood, specialty, or garage name.
Garages.empty_default: The directory is currently being updated for your area.
Garages.description_fallback: Detailed information is available on the garage profile.
Garages.map_placeholder: The interactive map will be displayed here.
Garages.trust_panel_desc: For the Haitian market, the most important thing is to know whether the garage is reachable, verified, and relevant to your need. This page helps you decide faster.
Garages.trust_item_1_desc: Match the listed expertise with your need before calling or traveling.
Garages.trust_item_2_desc: Prioritize garages with a visible phone number to save time when traffic or distance matters.
Garages.trust_item_3_desc: Once the right garage is identified, sign in to prepare a cleaner appointment request.
Garages.specialties_fallback: This garage's specialties have not been specified yet.
Garages.detail_description_fallback: This garage is listed in the AUTONORME network. Detailed information is still being enriched.
Garages.book_desc: Select a date and a reason to book an appointment with this garage. Confirmation is immediate.

Parts.title: AUTOparts Catalog
Parts.subtitle: Buy guaranteed spare parts for your vehicle. Delivery anywhere in Haiti.
Parts.highlight_2: Quick reading by category and reference
Parts.search_placeholder: Search for a part, a brand...
Parts.results_hint: Start with a reference, brand, or category
Parts.load_error: Unable to load the catalog right now. Check your connection and try again.
Parts.empty_search: Try another reference, brand, or category.
Parts.empty_default: The catalog is currently being updated for this selection.
Parts.detail_description: This page gathers the information currently available in the AUTONORME catalog: supplier, stock location, availability, and known compatible vehicles.
Parts.compatibility_fallback: Compatible vehicles have not been specified yet for this part.
Parts.compatibility_note: Detailed compatibility verification currently requires signing in to a customer account.

AutoBot.title: AutoBot AI Assistant
AutoBot.subtitle: Ask questions about mechanics, find parts or book an appointment naturally.
AutoBot.hero_title: AutoBot, to clarify before you act.
AutoBot.hero_subtitle: Ask a question about a breakdown, a part, or a garage. AutoBot uses the AUTONORME framework to guide the exchange and help you prepare the right next step.
AutoBot.welcome: Hello. I am AutoBot, the AUTONORME assistant. I can help explain a symptom, locate a part, or prepare a garage search. Just tell me what you need.
AutoBot.assist_desc: AutoBot is more useful when you describe the concrete need: symptom, vehicle, city, or type of part. The goal is to guide you cleanly, not to replace a full diagnosis.
AutoBot.guide_1_title: Start with the symptom or the part
AutoBot.guide_1_desc: Example: brake noise, weak battery, shock absorber, alternator, oil filter.
AutoBot.guide_2_desc: Make, model, and year help AutoBot stay relevant without wasting your time.
AutoBot.guide_3_title: Specify the city if you need a garage
AutoBot.guide_3_desc: In Haiti, area and neighborhood matter a lot before deciding to travel.
AutoBot.prompt_desc: You can start with a simple request and let AutoBot refine the rest with you.
AutoBot.prompt_1: I need brake pads for a 2020 Toyota Corolla.
AutoBot.prompt_2: I am in Delmas and I need a garage for a diagnostic.
AutoBot.prompt_3: My battery drains quickly. Where should I start?
AutoBot.network_error: I can't reach AutoBot right now. Please check your connection and try again.
AutoBot.disclaimer: AutoBot can make mistakes. Always verify important information before a repair or purchase.

MaintenancePage.title: Better maintenance follow-up, designed for the realities of the Haitian market.
MaintenancePage.subtitle: AUTONORME structures maintenance around the vehicle, mileage, service history, and useful reminders. The goal is not to add noise, but to make the next decision clearer.
MaintenancePage.highlight_1: Useful reminders before the due date
MaintenancePage.highlight_3: A simpler path toward the right garage
MaintenancePage.panel_body: The platform prepares a more credible calendar so you know what to do, when to act, and how to confirm the intervention with less uncertainty.
MaintenancePage.panel_1_body: Receive the right signal before a small need turns into an expensive emergency.
MaintenancePage.panel_2_body: History, recent work, and next deadlines are grouped in one place.
MaintenancePage.panel_3_body: From the calendar, you can then book, compare options, or ask AutoBot for advice.
MaintenancePage.section_value_body: In Haiti, wasting time, traveling unnecessarily, or forgetting routine service often becomes more expensive later. This page therefore needs to simplify anticipation first.
MaintenancePage.pillar_1_body: The calendar highlights the maintenance moments that really matter, without turning service into a complicated dashboard.
MaintenancePage.pillar_2_title: Create better conversations with the garage
MaintenancePage.pillar_2_body: With a clear history, both customer and garage begin from the same context and avoid vague exchanges.
MaintenancePage.pillar_3_body: Maintenance does not live alone: it naturally leads to a parts need, AutoBot guidance, or an appointment.
MaintenancePage.section_steps_body: The system must stay simple, mobile-first, and reassuring at every step.
MaintenancePage.step_1_body: The customer quickly finds the relevant vehicle, the latest known services, and the right usage markers.
MaintenancePage.step_2_body: The planner prioritizes real urgency, not an abstract list of tasks. What is near or critical comes first.
MaintenancePage.step_3_body: A reminder should lead naturally to a garage, AutoBot guidance, or order preparation without rebuilding the whole context.
MaintenancePage.cta_title: Move from reminder to action without friction
MaintenancePage.cta_body: Create your customer space to find your vehicles, your due dates, and the next recommended actions.

AboutPage.title: Digitizing and making the Haitian automotive sector more reliable.
AboutPage.subtitle: AUTONORME is not just an automotive website. It is a trust infrastructure connecting drivers, garages, parts sellers, and intelligent assistance around one shared standard.
AboutPage.panel_body: Build an automotive standard that is useful, credible, and accessible, capable of reducing uncertainty for every player in the market.
AboutPage.stat_3_label: product surfaces planned in the ecosystem
AboutPage.mission_body: Make garages more visible, parts easier to understand, decisions safer, and the customer experience more reliable at every step of the automotive journey.
AboutPage.value_1_body: Every screen should help verify, compare, and decide rather than add vague promises.
AboutPage.value_2_body: The product must work for mobile, multilingual usage and sometimes under connectivity or time constraints.
AboutPage.value_3_body: AI, reminders, and the marketplace only matter if they lead to a simple and reliable action.
AboutPage.ecosystem_body: Public site, customer account, professional dashboards, AutoBot, WhatsApp, and mobile all need to share the same business logic to avoid double promises.
AboutPage.partners_title: Garages, suppliers, and the AUTONORME team
AboutPage.partners_body: The project moves with a long-term vision: better structure services, improve visibility for serious players, and prepare a better national customer experience.
AboutPage.cta_title: Want to follow the project more closely?
AboutPage.cta_body: Explore our content, discover the platform, and see how to join the AUTONORME ecosystem.

JoinPage.title: Join AUTONORME as a garage or supplier.
JoinPage.subtitle: The promise is not only to be visible online. It is also about entering a more structured, more traceable, and easier-to-activate system for customers.
JoinPage.highlight_3: A serious foundation to digitize operations
JoinPage.panel_body: AUTONORME needs to stay useful for customers and credible for partners. Enrollment therefore relies on validation, field information, and service quality.
JoinPage.panel_1_body: Name, specialties, area, availability, and contact methods need to be reliable.
JoinPage.panel_2_body: The goal is not a simple directory, but a journey that genuinely helps the customer choose.
JoinPage.panel_3_body: A partner can start with a simple base, then enrich profile, stock, or services over time.
JoinPage.track_1_body: Present specialties, contact details, opening times, and prepare cleaner appointment flows with the right customer context.
JoinPage.track_2_body: Expose references, local stock, import delays, and useful location data to make your offers more actionable.
JoinPage.steps_body: The journey must stay easy to fill in while remaining serious enough to protect network quality.
JoinPage.step_1_body: The partner describes the business, area, specialties, and the main services or product families involved.
JoinPage.step_2_body: Phone, city, neighborhood, availability, stock quality, or service type must be precise enough.
JoinPage.step_3_body: Once the base is validated, the profile can be published and improved progressively with AUTONORME.
JoinPage.cta_title: Prepare your entry into the network
JoinPage.cta_body: Start by creating an account and discover the level of information expected for a credible listing.

BlogPage.title: A useful blog to maintain, understand, and decide better.
BlogPage.subtitle: The AUTONORME blog should help Haitian drivers better read their needs, prepare decisions, and keep stronger control over maintenance and parts.
BlogPage.highlight_2: Content designed for the Haitian context
BlogPage.highlight_3: A natural bridge toward garages, parts, and AutoBot
BlogPage.panel_body: Content prioritizes useful education: maintenance signals, good questions to ask, compatibility, delays, and field realities.
BlogPage.panel_1_body: Simple content to understand what is urgent, preventive, or simply worth monitoring.
BlogPage.panel_2_body: Articles that help prevent reference mistakes or poorly prepared purchases.
BlogPage.panel_3_body: Every article should lead to a concrete action or a better question to ask.
BlogPage.articles_body: These first topics structure the tone and promise of the blog while a broader editorial line is prepared.
BlogPage.article_1_title: When should you really anticipate an oil change or brake inspection?
BlogPage.article_1_body: A simple guide to identify useful signals, avoid late maintenance, and prepare a garage visit more confidently.
BlogPage.article_2_title: How can you avoid a part mistake before ordering?
BlogPage.article_2_body: Reference, model, year, local stock, and compatibility: the right checks before confirming an order.
BlogPage.article_3_title: Choosing a garage in Haiti: what to verify before traveling
BlogPage.article_3_body: Phone, specialty, neighborhood, availability, and clear needs: what really helps you decide quickly.
BlogPage.cta_body: Check the maintenance planner or use AutoBot to turn a doubt into the next useful action.

Account.login_subtitle: Manage your vehicle easily from your fingertips.
Account.login_desc: Access your maintenance history, track your parts orders and easily book appointments with our certified garages.
Account.step1_desc: Enter your phone number. We will send you a validation code.
Account.step2_desc: A 6-digit code has been sent to
Account.dash_desc: Here is a summary of your activity on AUTONORME.
Account.manual_redirect: Click here if you are not redirected
Account.dashboard_intro: Welcome to your AUTONORME personal space.
Account.dashboard_maintenance_hint: One action to confirm this week
Account.dashboard_alert_1_body: Toyota RAV4 — due soon according to your latest recorded service.
Account.dashboard_alert_2_body: A 12V battery order is still being prepared and may require attention.
Account.dashboard_vehicle_focus_body: Find the history, next due items, and a clearer view of the most useful interventions on your main vehicle.
Account.dashboard_vehicle_focus_live: {vehicle} currently concentrates {records} recorded service item(s) and {reminders} open reminder(s).
Account.dashboard_notifications_body: Keep an eye on maintenance reminders, appointment confirmations, and order statuses from one place.
Account.vehicle_count_hint: {count} active vehicle(s) linked to the account
Account.orders_subtitle: Track the status of your auto parts orders.
Account.appointments_subtitle_new: See upcoming visits, past appointments, and the next useful confirmations in one place.
Account.appointments_list_body: Each row should quickly tell you where to go, why, and how far the exchange with the garage has progressed.
Account.appointments_subtitle: View and manage your appointments with AUTONORME certified garages.
Account.vehicles_subtitle: Group your vehicles, track their history, and prepare maintenance decisions more easily.
Account.vehicles_error: Unable to load your vehicles right now.
Account.vehicles_empty_body: Your account is ready, but no vehicle is linked to your customer space yet. Start by describing your vehicle to AutoBot or complete onboarding with a garage.
Account.vehicles_auth_required: Sign in to view your vehicles
Account.vehicle_detail_subtitle: A clearer view of service history, reminders, and the next useful actions for your main vehicle.
Account.vehicle_detail_not_found: Unable to find this vehicle file.
Account.vehicle_snapshot_body: This file should gather the reliable information needed before a parts order, an appointment, or a maintenance reminder.
Account.vehicle_history_empty: No maintenance history has been surfaced for this vehicle yet.
Account.vehicle_next_body: The system is currently highlighting a brake inspection and a fluid review in the coming weeks.
Account.vehicle_reminders_empty: There are currently no open reminders for this vehicle.
Account.vehicle_appointments_empty: No recent appointments are linked to this vehicle.
Account.vehicle_risks_empty: No open risk is currently surfaced on this file.
Account.vehicle_back_body: Return to your vehicle list if you want to compare several histories or add a new one.
Account.vehicle_auth_required: Sign in to view this vehicle file
Account.vehicle_delete_confirm: Do you really want to remove {vehicle} from your customer space?
Account.vehicle_form_create_subtitle: Start with the essential details. Technical information can be added later as the vehicle file becomes richer.
Account.vehicle_form_edit_subtitle: Correct or complete the information used for reminders, parts compatibility, and appointments.
Account.vehicle_form_submit_error: Unable to save this vehicle right now.
Account.vehicle_form_required_error: Please fill in at least make, model, year, and fuel type.
Account.vehicle_form_advanced_body: These fields stay optional, but they improve follow-up quality, parts compatibility, and useful reminders.
Account.maintenance_subtitle: A simple schedule to know what to watch, what to confirm, and what action to prepare next.
Account.maintenance_schedule_body: The schedule prioritizes the most useful signals before travel or appointment booking.
Account.maintenance_item_1_meta: Toyota RAV4 • ideal window within the next 12 days
Account.maintenance_item_2_meta: Toyota Corolla • reminder in about 5 weeks
Account.notifications_subtitle: Centralize important reminders and keep control over how AUTONORME contacts you.
Account.notification_1_body: A brake inspection must be confirmed for your Toyota RAV4 within the next few days.
Account.notification_2_body: Your 12V battery is still being prepared by the supplier.
Account.notification_3_body: The garage has confirmed your slot tomorrow at 2:00 PM.
Account.profile_subtitle: Review your personal information, security settings, and the foundations of your relationship with AUTONORME.
Account.profile_security_body: These settings shape account access and the way critical reminders are confirmed.
Account.profile_security_1_body: The main phone number remains the reference for verification codes.
Account.profile_security_2_body: WhatsApp and notifications are preferred for important confirmations.
Account.login_step1_desc: Enter your phone number to receive a verification code.
